headline: Media Titan Ted Turner Dies: How He Revolutionized Global Television
lede: Cable news pioneer Ted Turner, who transformed media landscape and launched CNN, passed away at 87, leaving an indelible mark on broadcast history.
body:
## A Broadcasting Revolution

Ted Turner didn't just change television — he reinvented how the world consumed information. The maverick media mogul built an empire that stretched far beyond traditional broadcasting boundaries, creating a 24-hour news cycle that would fundamentally alter global communication.

## CNN and Beyond

When Turner launched Cable News Network in 1980, industry veterans scoffed at the concept of round-the-clock news programming. His audacious vision proved prophetic, establishing a template that every subsequent news organization would eventually follow. CNN became the definitive source for breaking international stories, from the Gulf War to geopolitical transformations.

## Media Entrepreneurship

Beyond news, Turner's media portfolio included groundbreaking entertainment properties. Turner Broadcasting System became a powerhouse, acquiring film libraries, producing original content, and ultimately merging with Time Warner in a landmark corporate transaction that reshaped entertainment economics.

## Cultural Impact

Turner's influence extended well beyond corporate boardrooms. He pioneered satellite broadcasting, championed environmental causes, and demonstrated that media could be both a commercial enterprise and a platform for global understanding.
key_facts: Merged with Time Warner in landmark deal
